/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -compatibility_version 1.0.0 -current_version 1.8.4 -o libwhisper.1.8.4.dylib -install_name @rpath/libwhisper.1.dylib CMakeFiles/whisper.dir/whisper_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/whisper.dir/whisper.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/zhaopeng.charles/code/magechiu/aiplayer/build/_deps/whispercpp-build/ggml/src -Wl,-rpath,/Users/zhaopeng.charles/code/magechiu/aiplayer/build/_deps/whispercpp-build/ggml/src/ggml-blas -Wl,-rpath,/Users/zhaopeng.charles/code/magechiu/aiplayer/build/_deps/whispercpp-build/ggml/src/ggml-metal ../ggml/src/libggml.0.9.8.dylib ../ggml/src/libggml-cpu.0.9.8.dylib ../ggml/src/ggml-blas/libggml-blas.0.9.8.dylib ../ggml/src/ggml-metal/libggml-metal.0.9.8.dylib ../ggml/src/libggml-base.0.9.8.dylib
